title: Replace Hero logo with newly uploaded DJ Fizz PNG

requirements.text: Save the uploaded image (0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png) as the new DJ Fizz logo static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png, replacing the existing file. Then update the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] in frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx to reference /assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png. Ensure the image container and any parent wrapper elements have no light background classes (no bg-white, bg-gray, or similar) so the logo renders cleanly against the dark hero background with no visible checkerboard artifact.

quotes: Replace original photo with the second one

acceptanceCriteria: The newly uploaded PNG (0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png) is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png, overwriting the previous logo file.
The element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] in Hero.tsx has its src set to /assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png.
No light background classes (bg-white, bg-gray, etc.) are present on the logo container or parent wrappers.
The new logo displays without a visible checkerboard transparent background pattern in the Hero section.

constraints: Only the Hero logo image and its container styling should be changed — no other Hero section content or layout should be modified.
Do not edit any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing the About section portrait image.
Altering any other section outside the Hero.

edits: Replace content entirely with the uploaded DJ Fizz logo PNG featuring neon green graffiti text, DJ turntable, and headphones on a transparent background (0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png > dj-fizz-logo.dim_1200x600.png)
